author: Sébastien Dubois
description: Render your notes as configurable Kanban boards and calendars inside Bases, with statuses, ordering, relationships, and scheduling. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Sébastien Dubois
manifest.description: Render your notes as configurable Kanban boards and calendars inside Bases, with statuses, ordering, relationships, and scheduling.
